fields.label: Profile Name
fields.description: Display name for the export profile

fields.label: Profile Code
fields.description: Unique identifier (slug). Example: bmecat_standard, csv_full_export

fields.label: Export Format
fields.options:
BMEcat 2005
BMEcat 1.2
CSV
JSON
XML
Excel
fields.description: Output format for the export

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this export profile

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Order in which profiles appear (lower = first)

fields.label: Channel
fields.description: Distribution channel for this export (optional)

fields.label: Export Language
fields.description: Language for exported product data

fields.label: Export Currency
fields.description: Currency for price exports

fields.label: Include Prices
fields.description: Include pricing information in export

fields.label: Product Family
fields.description: Only export products from this family (leave empty for all)

fields.label: Status Filter
fields.description: Only export products with this status (leave empty for all)

fields.label: Minimum Completeness
fields.description: Only export products with completeness score >= this value

fields.label: Include Variants
fields.description: Include product variants in export

fields.label: Include Media URLs
fields.description: Include product image and media URLs

fields.label: CSV Delimiter
fields.description: Field delimiter for CSV exports

fields.label: CSV Encoding
fields.description: Character encoding for CSV exports

fields.label: XML Root Element
fields.description: Root element name for XML exports

fields.label: Pretty Print
fields.description: Format output with indentation for readability

fields.label: Supplier ID
fields.description: SUPPLIER_ID element in BMEcat catalog

fields.label: Supplier Name
fields.description: SUPPLIER_NAME element in BMEcat catalog

fields.label: Catalog ID
fields.description: CATALOG_ID element in BMEcat catalog

fields.label: Catalog Version
fields.description: CATALOG_VERSION element in BMEcat catalog

fields.label: Scheduled Export
fields.description: Enable automatic scheduled exports

fields.label: Frequency
fields.description: How often to run the scheduled export

fields.label: Time
fields.description: Time of day to run the export (server time)

fields.label: Last Export
fields.description: Timestamp of last export run

fields.label: Output Filename
fields.description: Filename pattern. Use {date}, {time}, {profile} as placeholders. Example: products_{date}.csv

fields.label: Compress Output
fields.description: Compress output file as ZIP archive

fields.label: Upload to Channel
fields.description: Automatically upload export file to the linked channel

fields.label: Last Export File
fields.description: Most recent exported file

fields.label: Delivery Method
fields.description: How to deliver the exported file

fields.label: Deliver After Export
fields.description: Automatically deliver file after export completes

fields.label: SFTP Host
fields.description: SFTP server hostname or IP address

fields.label: SFTP Port
fields.description: SFTP server port (default: 22)

fields.label: SFTP Username
fields.description: Username for SFTP authentication

fields.label: SFTP Password
fields.description: Password for SFTP authentication (use key-based auth when possible)

fields.label: Private Key File
fields.description: SSH private key file for key-based authentication

fields.label: Remote Path
fields.description: Remote directory path on SFTP server. Example: /uploads/feeds

fields.label: Verify Host Key
fields.description: Verify SFTP server host key (recommended for security)

fields.label: Last Delivery
fields.description: Timestamp of last successful delivery

fields.label: Delivery Status
fields.description: Status of the last delivery attempt

fields.label: Delivery Error
fields.description: Error details if last delivery failed

fields.label: Export Status
fields.description: Status of the last export

fields.label: Products Exported
fields.description: Number of products in the last export

fields.label: Error Message
fields.description: Error details if last export failed

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description and notes about this export profile
